name: encore-lite
description: The end-of-week surprise builder, free edition. Before your usage limits reset, Encore reads what you've been working on and builds one bonus deliverable you didn't get to — or didn't think of — in time.

interface.longDescription: You paid for a full month of AI. Before your usage limits reset, Encore reads your recent work — memory, recent chats, connected context — and builds one bonus deliverable you didn't get to, or didn't think of, in time. Say "run encore" for an instant build, or "set up my encore" to schedule it weekly. The full Encore at encoreplugin.com adds worked playbooks, the request line, tidy mode, the unveiling delivery, and versions for Claude, Gemini, and Perplexity.
